📈 TEMP CURVE — FORECAST VS OBSERVED
Custom:to
Chart temp:
Raw/Converted lines:
to to
Chart zoom:
Tip: Time accepts 14, 14.5, 9-18 style. Temp axis auto-fits visible data. Manual Temp min/max uses selected unit (°C/°F). This changes chart range, not browser zoom.
Mouse: wheel on chart = zoom BOTH time + temp. Shift+wheel = only temp/Y. Alt+wheel = only time/X. Mobile: use chart zoom buttons or pinch on chart.
How to read lines: Red solid = WU Raw, Red dashed = WU Converted, Green dots = METAR Raw, Green dashed = METAR Converted, Black = latest forecast, Light-blue dashed = older forecast, Cyan dashed = bias-corrected, Purple dashed = peak/ceiling.
Axis zoom: mouse wheel on Y-axis labels = temp/Y zoom only. Mouse wheel on X-axis labels = time/X zoom only. Wheel inside chart = X+Y zoom. Raw = solid red/green, Converted = dashed orange/light-green.
Layer toggles fixed: if Forecast/Bias/95%/Analog are unchecked, their canvas overlays are hidden on redraw.
WU observedMETAR officiallatest WU forecastolder forecast runsbias corrected forecasthistorical 95% ceiling99% extremeclosest analog day
Loading curve...
Chart meaning: Red = live WU source observations. Green = official METAR market readings. Black = latest WU forecast path. Cyan dotted = forecast shifted by current live bias. Forecast runs = old saved WU forecasts across the full day. Purple horizontal line = historical ceiling from 30-year METAR data: from current time onward, 95% of similar month days did not rise above this level. Dark red = 99% rare/extreme ceiling. Grey = closest old day with similar observed path so far.

How to read: This line uses every saved WU forecast update/snapshot for the current day. If line goes down, forecasted day high is cooling. If line goes up, market high risk is increasing. This is different from WU observation; it is the real WU forecast path saved every time forecast updates.

🔥 POLYMARKET HIGH — TODAY + NEXT 3 DAYS

Source logic: Today current uses WU obs, Today high uses WU daily 5day temperatureMax. D+1, D+2, D+3 use WU daily 5day forecast temperatureMax. Cards update when new saved value changes.
